mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_CODE = #{itemCode}

SELECT ITEM_ID AS itemId, ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, CATEGORY AS category, SPEC AS spec, UNIT AS unit, PURCHASE_PRICE AS purchasePrice, SALE_PRICE AS salePrice, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM ITEMS WHERE 1=1
AND ITEM_CODE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemCode}, '%')
AND ITEM_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #{itemName}, '%')
AND CATEGORY LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%')
AND ITEM_TYPE = #{itemType}
AND USE_YN = #{useYn}
ORDER BY ITEM_ID DESC

SELECT ITEM_ID AS itemId, ITEM_CODE AS itemCode, ITEM_NAME AS itemName, ITEM_TYPE AS itemType, CATEGORY AS category, SPEC AS spec, UNIT AS unit, PURCHASE_PRICE AS purchasePrice, SALE_PRICE AS salePrice, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM ITEMS WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
mapper.update: UPDATE ITEMS SET ITEM_NAME = #{itemName}, ITEM_TYPE = #{itemType}, CATEGORY = #{category}, SPEC = #{spec}, UNIT = #{unit}, PURCHASE_PRICE = IFNULL(#{purchasePrice}, 0.00), SALE_PRICE = IFNULL(#{salePrice}, 0.00), USE_YN = #{useYn}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE ITEM_ID = #{itemId}
